width.$description: Width of the visible focus ring used for keyboard focus states.

offset.$description: Space between a focused element and its focus ring.

radius.$description: Default corner radius for standard interactive controls.

sm.$description: Small control height for compact buttons, inputs, and select-like controls.

md.$description: Medium control height for default buttons, inputs, and select-like controls.

lg.$description: Large control height for prominent buttons, inputs, and select-like controls.

xl.$description: Extra large control height for spacious buttons, inputs, and select-like controls.

sm.$description: Small maximum width for constrained content regions.

md.$description: Medium maximum width for constrained content regions.

lg.$description: Large maximum width for constrained content regions.

xl.$description: Extra large maximum width for constrained content regions.

weight.$description: Font weight for the display typography role.

size.$description: Font size for the display typography role.

tracking.$description: Letter spacing for the display typography role.

height.$description: Line height for the display typography role.
